channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles defense smothers Mahomes and dominates Kansas City in franchise's second Super Bowl win
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Cooper DeJean took an interception to the house, Zack Baun made a pick in his old professional home and the Eagles so thoroughly thrashed Patrick Mahomes that by the time Kendrick Lamar had “Game Over” brightened in the Superdome stands to end his halftime set, it was just as clea
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jalen Hurts quiets any doubters with a Super Bowl MVP
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Jalen Hurts has often been judged by his failings more than his successes over the course of his career. Getting benched at halftime of a college football championship game. Being forced to transfer from Alabama to Oklahoma just to be able to regain a starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles win Super Bowl LIX, denying Chiefs history in dominant fashion
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles said no to NFL history from the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday in New Orleans, as they dominated their opponent to win Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Eagles Cooper DeJean scores pick-six on birthday
item.description: Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean made an already memorable 22nd birthday even bigger during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 76ers' Embiid says he's 'looking into every option' if his knee is bothering him at end of season
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers center Joel Embiid acknowledged Sunday he may have to undergo another surgery on the left knee that has bothered him the last year if it isn’t feeling any better by the end of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brett Favre reveals Super Bowl LIX prediction – and it's similar to Trump's
item.description: NFL Hall of Famer Brett Favre reveals his Super Bowl LIX pick, going with the favorite and the same team that President Trump selected.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump makes Super Bowl LIX prediction, praises Patrick Mahomes' wife
item.description: President Donald Trump made a Super Bowl LIX pick between the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles and had praise for Patrick Mahomes' wife, Brittany.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl commercials rely on comedy and nostalgia to avoid potential missteps
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles dominated the Kansas City Chiefs on the field in this year’s Super Bowl, while laughter dominated the commercials.
item.dc:creator: Dee-Ann Durbin, Mae Anderson And Wyatte Grantham-Philips, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Radek Faksa scores in the 10th round of the shootout to give Blues a 6-5 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Radek Faksa scored in the 10th round of the shootout to give the St. Louis Blues a 6-5 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: The well-liked Jauron moved into coaching and five years later was hired by the Bills as a defensive backs coach.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into matchup with the Predators
item.description: Nashville Predators (18-27-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (16-31-6, in the Central Division) Chicago; Friday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks play the Nashville Predators after losing three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Penguins at the Birch Aquarium make their Super Bowl predictions
item.description: Some penguins at the Birch Aquarium at University of California, San Diego's Scripps Institution of Oceanography made their bets on which team will win the big game on Super Bowl Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Josh Giddey, Matas Buzelis score 24 to lead the Bulls over the Heat 133-124
item.description: Rookie Matas Buzelis scored a career-best 24 points and Josh Giddey matched it to help the Chicago Bulls top the Miami Heat 133-124 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SDFC completes Sharp Healthcare Performance Center on Sycuan land
item.description: Almost three years in the making, San Diego FC’s Sharp Healthcare Performance Center is now complete.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: How GJ's Andrew Henderson became the Tigers' hero on Friday
item.description: “One of the coolest moments of my high school career," said Andrew Henderson smiling from ear to ear as he reflected on the shot of his life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
